creator: krion@FreeBSD.org
text:
I couldn't test this patch:
--------------------------
|Index: sysutils/fd/Makefile
|===================================================================
|--- sysutils/fd/Makefile       (revision 458801)
|+++ sysutils/fd/Makefile       (working copy)
--------------------------
Patching file Makefile using Plan A...
Hunk #1 failed at 3.
Hunk #2 failed at 21.
Hunk #3 failed at 81.
Hunk #4 failed at 96.
4 out of 4 hunks failed while patching Makefile
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|Index: sysutils/fd/distinfo
|===================================================================
|--- sysutils/fd/distinfo       (revision 458801)
|+++ sysutils/fd/distinfo       (working copy)
--------------------------
Patching file distinfo using Plan A...
Hunk #1 failed at 1.
Hunk #2 failed at 83.
Hunk #3 failed at 91.
3 out of 3 hunks failed while patching distinfo
done
